mapper.select: select user_id, available_wag, total_earned_wag, total_exchanged_wag, create_time, update_time from sys_user_wag_wallet where user_id = #{userId} limit 1
select user_id, available_wag, total_earned_wag, total_exchanged_wag, create_time, update_time from sys_user_wag_wallet where user_id = #{userId} limit 1 for update
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user_wag_wallet(user_id, available_wag, total_earned_wag, total_exchanged_wag, create_time, update_time) values(#{userId}, #{availableWag}, #{totalEarnedWag}, #{totalExchangedWag}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update sys_user_wag_wallet set available_wag = #{availableWag}, total_earned_wag = #{totalEarnedWag}, total_exchanged_wag = #{totalExchangedWag}, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId}
